zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joana Beverley於1505年出生在英國瓦維其可爾易爾明頓時，她的父親William Beverley81歲，母親Alice DeGrey82歲。她於1521年與Sir Valentine Pettit結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年3月12日在英國英格蘭肯特明斯特享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joana Beverley于1505年出生在英国瓦維其可爾易爾明頓时，她的父亲William Beverley81岁，母亲Alice DeGrey82岁。她于1521年与Sir Valentine Pettit结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1545年3月12日在英国英格兰肯特明斯特享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (North eastern England): habitational name from the city in East Yorkshire, the name of which contains Old English beofor ‘beaver’, combined with a second element, licc, that may mean ‘stream’.

variants.name: Beverly
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Beverley  .

nameMeanings.name: Joana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joana Beverley was born in 1505, in Ilmington, Warwickshire, England, her father, William Beverley, was 81 and her mother, Alice DeGrey, was 82. She married Sir Valentine Pettit in 1521. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 12 March 1545, in Minster, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joana Beverley est née en 1505, à Ilmington, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William Beverley, avait 81 ans et sa mère, Alice DeGrey, avait 82 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Valentine Pettit en 1521. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1545, à Minster, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joana Beverley 1505 in Ilmington, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Beverley 81 und ihre Mutter Alice DeGrey 82. Sie hat 1521 Sir Valentine Pettit geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. März 1545 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Minster, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joana Beverley è nata il nel 1505 nel Ilmington, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, William Beverley, aveva 81 anni e sua madre, Alice DeGrey, aveva 82 anni. Lei sposato Sir Valentine Pettit nel 1521. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 marzo 1545, nel Minster, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joana Beverleyが1505年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアイルミントンで生まれた時，父William Beverleyは81歳，母Alice DeGreyは82歳であった。1521年にSir Valentine Pettitと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年3月12日にイギリスイギリスケントミンスターで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joana Beverley(이)가 1505년 영국 워윅실르 이밍턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Beverley(은)는 81세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice DeGrey(은)는 82세였다. 그녀는 1521년 Sir Valentine Pettit(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 민스터에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joana Beverley nasceu em 1505, em Ilmington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Beverley, tinha 81 anos e sua mãe, Alice DeGrey, tinha 82 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Valentine Pettit em 1521. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de março de 1545, em Minster, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joana Beverley родилась в 1505 г. в местности илмингтон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Beverley было 81 год, а матери, которую звали Alice DeGrey, 82. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Valentine Pettit в 1521 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 12 марта 1545 г. в местности минстир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joana Beverley nació en 1505, en Ilmington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Beverley, tenía 81 años y su mamá, Alice DeGrey, tenía 82 años. Se casó con Sir Valentine Pettit en 1521. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1545, en Minster, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
